channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Ce géant français de l’automobile va fabriquer des moteurs pour drones militaires
item.description: Un moteur de drone conçu et fabriqué en France, sans terres rares chinoises, dès début 2027 : Valeo signe avec Harmattan AI son premier contrat dans les drones. L'équipementier auto continue sa reconversion, et elle dit beaucoup de l'époque.

item.title: Climatisation : le tarif « Tempo » d’EDF peut sauver votre facture, mais attention aux pièges
item.description: Coupler une climatisation réversible à l'offre Tempo d'EDF peut vraiment alléger la facture. Mais sans automatisation, un seul jour rouge mal géré suffit à effacer les économies de toute l'année.

item.title: Quel iPad choisir en 2026 ? Notre comparatif des meilleures tablettes Apple
item.description: Que vous soyez un pro de la création, étudiant(e) ou simplement à la recherche d’une tablette pour Netflix et un peu de surf sur le web, voici notre sélection des meilleurs iPad sur le marché.

item.title: 22 Back-to-School College Dorm Room Essentials (2026)
item.description: Deck out your room and make class a cinch with these WIRED-tested favorites.

item.title: The right-wing boomers protesting data centers have a lot in common with the left
item.description: On a gray, humid Saturday morning in central Florida, a little under a dozen people gathered outside the Spring Hill Branch Library to protest the construction of a hyperscale data center in their community. There was no immediate threat - the Hernando County commission had unanimously approved a one-year moratorium on such developments in June […]

item.title: GoPro Wireless Mic System review: An audio upgrade with fixable flaws
item.description: GoPro's Wireless Mic System nails the basics, but it has some frustrating flaws.

item.title: Pre-order the Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 from Amazon and get a free $100 gift card
item.description: As of July 23, Amazon's offering a $100 gift card as a bonus when you preorder the Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 there.

item.title: Uber lays off 10 percent of its customer service team in favor of using AI
item.description: Uber's global customer service network has been hit by layoffs in favor of AI.

item.title: South Korea warns diplomats they could be at risk following hack on education system
item.description: Initial reports are saying up to 6,000 people might have been affected.

item.title: The Best Vacuum for Pet Hair—We Tested Many to Find Which Ones Work Best (2026)
item.description: Cordless, handheld, robot, and traditional—we tested them all to find the vacuum that’s fantastic for fur.

item.title: Cette batterie externe magnétique signée Samsung (Qi2 15 W) à moins de 20 € peut recharger deux appareils en même temps
item.description: Compatible avec la charge sans fil Qi2 jusqu’à 15 W, et proposant également une charge filaire jusqu'à 25 W, la batterie externe magnétique Samsung est proposée à un très bon prix grâce à une ODR. Elle peut en effet vous revenir à 19,99 euros au lieu de 59,99 euros chez Fnac, mais aussi chez Darty.

item.title: Gamers, make your voices heard — from PlayStation going discless to the endless layoffs at Xbox, what do you think are the biggest issues with gaming right now?
item.description: Gaming in 2026 isn’t looking too bright — but what's your biggest worry?

item.title: L’Europe inflige d’énormes amendes à Google, risquant la colère de Washington
item.description: L’UE a infligé jeudi à Google un total de 890 millions d’euros d’amendes, pour des atteintes à la concurrence dans la recherche en ligne et au sein du magasin d’application Google Play, au risque d’une nouvelle crise avec Washington.

item.title: Hunting for a pair of headphones that won't break the bank? These sub-$70 / £65 pairs all punch above their price tag
item.description: These are the affordable headphones and earbuds actually worth buying.

item.title: Europe hits Google with $1 billion fine for boxing-out rivals
item.description: Europe has hit Google with a $1 billion fine for illegally abusing its search engine dominance.

item.title: Perseid meteor shower 2026: Peak dates, best viewing times, and how to see it
item.description: See the Perseid meteor shower with all the details for the 2026 display, including peaks and viewing times.

item.title: Technics lance une édition limitée des écouteurs à fluide magnétique en hommage aux Rolling Stones
item.description: Technics associe son savoir-faire audio à l'héritage des Rolling Stones avec une édition limitée des écouteurs EAH-AZ100, lancée à l'occasion de la sortie de l'album « Foreign Tongues ».

item.title: Avec les lunettes Samsung, « notre but n’est pas de remplacer le smartphone »
item.description: Samsung affirme que ses prochaines lunettes IA n'ont pas pour objectif de remplacer le smartphone, mais de vous aider à moins l'utiliser.

item.title: Moon phase today: What the Moon will look like on July 23
item.description: See the Moon phase expected for July 23, 2026 as well as when the next Full Moon is expected.

item.title: The Best MagSafe Wallets for Your Everyday Carry (2026)
item.description: The slim and convenient magnetic wallets you’ll actually want stuck to the back of your phone.

item.title: Windows 11 : Microsoft va enfin moderniser les éléments hérités de Windows 95
item.description: Microsoft entreprend un travail de modernisation nécessaire de Windows 11. La firme de Redmond est en train de remplacer les éléments d’interface hérité de Windows 95 par des versions contemporaines basées sur WinUI 3.

item.title: The Trump Administration Wants to Change Public Engagement Rules for Polluters
item.description: The EPA has proposed a rule change that would let states decide how much input the public has on air pollution permits. It would be a huge boon for data centers increasingly reliant on fossil fuels.

item.title: Experts say exploiting Anthropic’s Fable isn’t how Kimi K3 got so good
item.description: "I don't think you get a model this strong and this quickly on the heels of Fable doing strictly distillation," one expert told TechCrunch.

item.title: You can now find local events on Tinder — and match with other attendees
item.description: Tinder is expanding its Events feature to more cities, with even more coming at the end of September.

item.title: It's your last chance to save 50% on Criterion 4K Blu-rays at Amazon and Barnes & Noble! Don't miss the movie mega-sale before it ends soon
item.description: You've only got a few days left to shop the huge 4K Blu-ray sale

item.title: DeLonghi just launched a coffee machine that makes both hot and iced drinks — and its yours for under $1,000
item.description: De'Longhi has launched the Magnifica Duo, a $999.95 automatic espresso and coffee machine with dual milk carafes for hot and cold drinks, 20 preset recipes, and a built-in grinder.

item.title: La version XXL de l’Apple Watch Series 11 perd 100 € quelques mois avant la sortie de la Series 12
item.description: L'Apple Watch Series 11, aka la meilleure smartwatch de la marque à la Pomme, est de retour à un excellent prix sur Amazon. La plateforme la propose en effet à 379 euros au lieu de 479 euros dans sa version 46 mm.

item.title: Why UK banks keep breaking down: the data problem hiding in plain sight
item.description: 800 hours of outages. Millions affected. The cause is closer to home than you think.

item.title: Preorders for the Pokémon TCG First Partner Illustration Collection Series 3 are under market price on Amazon — save nearly $5
item.description: Pre-order Pokémon TCG First Partner Illustration Collection Series 3 at Amazon for $80.86, below its $84.01 market price.

item.title: America’s Hot Hybrid Summer
item.description: Gas prices are up, and US car dealerships are full of hybrids. Customers are going for it.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2: Whole Health Tracking | Lab Report
item.description: Take a closer look at the Galaxy Watch 9 and Watch Ultra 2, including new health tracking features, AI tools, and key upgrades.

item.title: Preorders for Legos new Donkey Kong Arcade are now live — release date, price, and where to buy
item.description: Lego has revealed the new Donkey Kong Arcade set. Here's where you can preorder it for $199.99 ahead of its Aug. 1 release.

item.title: 'Brick and mortar game retail is doomed' — Analysts report $7.2 billion second-hand game market could be in danger thanks to Sony's plan to retire the production of physical discs
item.description: The second-hand video game market could be in danger as a result of Sony's decision to end production of physical discs starting in January 2028.

item.title: NYT Mini crossword answers, hints for July 23, 2026
item.description: Answers to each clue for the July 23, 2026 edition of NYT's The Mini crossword puzzle.

item.title: Samsung unpacked: New foldable phones, watches and more
item.description: Samsung unveiled new Galaxy foldables, smartwatches, AI features, and more at Galaxy Unpacked. Here's a recap of everything announced.

item.title: AdultFriendFinder cost: How much it is, how it bills
item.description: How much does Adult Friend Finder cost? What is the monthly AFF cost and how it bills.

item.title: The foundation agentic AI can’t function without
item.description: Enterprises can no longer afford to treat the middleware layer as an afterthought.

item.title: Google hit with $1 billion fine for breaking EU antitrust rules
item.description: The European Union has fined Google's parent company Alphabet €890 million (about $1 billion) for two separate violations of the bloc's Digital Markets Act (DMA). One penalty is for giving its own products preferential treatment in search results, while the other is for blocking Android developers from sending users to alternate payment options. A €460 […]...

item.title: 10 Best Meal Delivery Services, Tested by an Ex-Restaurant Critic
item.description: Here are the best delivery services and meal kits in 2026, including Martha Stewart’s meal service, a GLP-1–supportive plan, and a budget-friendly option.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 vs Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra : les différences à connaître
item.description: Voici un comparatif exposant les différences à connaître entre les nouveaux Galaxy Z Fold 8 et Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra de Samsung.

item.title: People Are Getting Off to Porn About ICE Raids
item.description: MAGA-coded adult content playing off immigration crackdowns, white supremacy, and obeying the “natural order” is finding rabid audiences on X.

item.title: Samsung’s new foldable phones are up to 48% cheaper in South Korea, and that’s no accident
item.description: Samsung has raised the prices for its new foldable phones, but South Korean buyers get a special deal.
